blended.narrative: Sundown Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.7 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,536 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 30°F, winds around 24 mph. Expect variable conditions.
Wednesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
